evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(3000);const mods=['dashboard','catalogo','almacen','zona','proveedores','cajas','finanzas','tributario','facturacion','config'];const out={vw:window.innerWidth,modulos:{}};for(const m of mods){try{MOS.nav(m)}catch(e){}await w(1600);const vw=window.innerWidth;const overflow=document.documentElement.scrollWidth>vw+1;const off=[...document.querySelectorAll('body *')].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>0&&r.right>vw+2&&r.left>=-1&&getComputedStyle(el).position!=='fixed';}).map(el=>({t:el.tagName.toLowerCase(),c:((el.className&&el.className.toString())||'').slice(0,45),w:Math.round(el.getBoundingClientRect().width)})).slice(0,6);out.modulos[m]={overflow,scrollW:document.documentElement.scrollWidth,off};}return out;})()
